# configurationData

**Instance Property**

Additional configuration information for the token instance.

## Declaration

```swift
var configurationData: Data? { get set }
```

## Discussion

[doc://com.apple.cryptotokenkit/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKToken/Configuration-swift.class/configurationData] can provide token-implementation-specific additional data, which the app that hosts the token driver extension and configures the token provides. The system doesn’t interpret this data in any way.

For example, the network-based hardware security module (HSM) can store encoded target network addresses, access credentials, or the list of identities the HSM contains.

## Reporting Configuration Information

- **instanceID**: The unique, persistent identifier of this token that the token implementation creates.
